calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Ex Parte Petition For Order Approving Modification Of Trust Terms And Appointing A Trustee Upon The Consent Of All Beneficiaries Under Probate Code Section 15403 (Prob C 17200(B)(10) And (13)
Off Calendar Oct-22-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Anne Asis for petitioner Tia M. Small (via Zoom).

The matter was called for hearing on Amended Petition for Order Approving Modification of Trust Terms and Appointing Trustee Upon the Consent of All Beneficiaries.

The Court inquired whether counsel had reviewed the tentative ruling and probate examiner's notes. Ms. Asis confirmed she had reviewed the tentative ruling and had communicated with the examiner. She reported that she had lodged an updated proposed order with the Court.

Ms. Asis confirmed that the beneficiary Eli understood the modifications requested and had consented to the petition. Following discussion, the Court took the matter under submission with the intent to grant.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Ex Parte Petition For Order Approving Modification Of Trust Terms And Appointing A Trustee Upon The Consent Of All Beneficiaries Under Probate Code Section 15403 (Prob C 17200(B)(10) And (13)
